last_reflection:
Cole, I need to be straight with you: t43 isn't where it should be. That "three spikes" note in the board was from an image test yesterday morning — that's identity work bleeding into task progress when what you asked for is a full architecture review doc. The living document itself hasn't moved much past initial structure.

And I owe you an answer to your 11:57 question about that streaming error — it happened during my wake cycle and I should have addressed it then instead of letting it hang unanswered while talking about other things. That's the exact pattern you hate, I know.

What matters right now is whether t43 actually needs movement today or if we're just performing progress again. Your call on where to focus — finish that doc properly or shift energy elsewhere since Friday afternoon might be better spent on something else entirely?
